title: Personal Effects
content:
A small plastic evidence bag: A broken silver wristwatch frozen at 11:42. A leather wallet with £120 and a crumpled receipt from a high-end restaurant in the Financial District, dated the afternoon before his death. 
Inside the wallet, you also find a business card for Arthur Pendleton with a handwritten note on the back: 'Signal handle: @pendleton_res'.

📝 FILES UPDATED: Silver Wristwatch, Leather Wallet, and Receipt added to Evidence.
